title: clerodendrum lloydianum
intro: Clerodendrum lloydianum, also known as Lloyd's clerodendrum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can help to reduce pain and prevent the growth of certain bacteria. The health benefits of Clerodendrum lloydianum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin care. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
